turns.user_message: I tried to distract myself today, but it didn't really work. I just ended up feeling worse.
I keep trying to push these feelings away, but they always come back stronger. It feels like I'm failing at feeling better.
I'm starting to wonder if I should actually talk to someone about this. I can't seem to fix it on my own anymore.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better.
